name: Aloo Turkey (الو تركيا)
description: A direct personal translator app for foreigners in Turkey. Connects users with live specialized translators for hospitals, government departments, police, and daily life scenarios.
features: Instant live voice connection with specialized translators.
Categorized translation services (Medical, Legal, Police, Daily Life).
Real-time availability status for online translators.
Secure in-app purchases and session billing.
my_role: Lead Mobile Developer - Architected a reliable, low-latency voice call system connecting users and translators instantly. Implemented real-time presence tracking and handled network edge-cases to prevent dropped calls during critical situations.
